prompt: Create a realistic full-body nighttime travel portrait of a young East Asian woman standing on a waterfront promenade in Hong Kong, facing slightly left with her head turned toward the illuminated skyline. She is centered in the frame behind a green metal railing, one hand lightly resting on the rail and the other relaxed at her side. She wears a cream cropped camisole, layered necklaces, very baggy light blue multi-pocket cargo jeans, and white platform slide sandals; include exactly 5 visible outfit/accessory elements: cream crop top, layered necklaces, baggy cargo jeans with multiple side pockets, white platform sandals, and small tattoos near the collarbone/upper chest. The background shows Victoria Harbour at night with dark rippling water, colorful neon reflections, dense skyscrapers, and recognizable Hong Kong-style towers, plus a brightly lit pier or ferry terminal building on the right. Use a wide horizontal 16:9 composition, eye-level camera, full-body framing with space above the skyline, wet pavement reflecting lights, crisp flash-lit subject against a detailed city nightscape, natural skin texture, realistic street photography look, high dynamic range, sharp focus, no text, no watermark.
